title: Pentameris thermalis
intro: Pentameris thermalis, also known as Eastern Fescue Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for gastrointestinal issues and sore muscles. The bioactive constituents of Pentameris thermalis include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made with Pentameris thermalis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
